channel.title: Pages on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on My Blog

item.title: About
item.description: About Me Hello! This is my personal blog. 📬 Contact Email: your-email@example.com GitHub: @your-username 🎯 Blog Content This blog shares: 📷 Photography 📹 Videos 🎵 Audio/Podcasts 📝 Life Notes This blog is powered by Hugo, supports bilingual (Chinese & English).
